title: Motivic measures and $\mathbb{F}_1$-geometries
abstract: Right adjoints for the forgetful functors on $λ$-rings and bi-rings are applied to motivic measures and their zeta functions on the Grothendieck ring of $\mathbb{F}_1$-varieties in the sense of Lorscheid and Lopez-Pena (torified schemes). This leads us to a specific subring of $\mathbb{W}(\mathbb{Z})$, properly containing Almkvist's ring $\mathbb{W}_0(\mathbb{Z})$, which might be a natural receptacle for all local factors of completed zeta functions.
